rationale: The egg-hatch tap hook is a generic ASMR/satisfaction trope with no connection to the game's connect-the-dots line-drawing core loop — players arriving from this ad would experience a hard bait-and-switch, hurting D1 retention and likely triggering store policy flags. Palette (pastel pink/teal) also clashes with the game's saturated blue/orange/red identity, and there's no character or hatching content in the app. Only the broad casual-female audience overlaps; do not greenlight unless reworked into a "tap to pop/clear" satisfaction frame using the actual colored spheres.
